content_sections.heading: Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 notification released for 10 posts of Assistant Professor. Candidates with M.Phil/Ph.D, MFSc Can Apply Online. The Online application process for Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 has started on 30 June 2026 and will remain open until 13-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Kamdhenu University website, kamdhenuuni.edu.in/.

content_sections.heading: Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download

You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. Kamdhenu University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Name of the Post : Kamdhenu University Assistant Professor Online Form 2026 Post Date : 01-07-2026 Total Vacancy : 10 Posts Brief Information: The Kamdhenu University has announced a notification for the recruitment of Assistant Professor Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

rows.kamdhenu_university_assistant_professor_: Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 Important Dates Starting Date for Apply: 30 June 2026 Last Date for Apply : 13-07-2026
Kamdhenu University Recruitment 2026 Age Limit Maximum Age limit: 40 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

Eligibility Criteria Good academic record with at least 55% of marks or an equivalent grade at the Master (M.F.Sc.) or Doctorate level degree in Aquaculture/ Fisheries Resource Management/ Fish Processing Technology/ Post-harvest Technology/ Aquatic Animal Health Management/ Aquatic Environment Management/ Fisheries Extension/ Fisheries Economics/ Fisheries Engineering/ Fish Nutrition and Feed Technology/ Fish Biotechnology/ Fish Genetics and Breeding, from a recognized university. The candidate should have passed the NET examination conducted by UGC/CSIR/ ICAR recognized by the State Government in the subject where, NET examination is conducted and should have published at least one article in National Academic Agriculture Science (NAAS) New Delhi rated journal. But candidate who has acquired Ph.D. degree with course work as per the UGC Notification 2009 and published two full length publication having a NAAS rating not less than four shall be exempted from NET. Those candidates with Ph. D. degree without course work will not be considered. The candidate should possess the basic knowledge of computer application and should have passed CCC examination.
Kamdhenu University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online
